name: Baked Beans C/p
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pick over beans.
2. Place beans in the crockpot.
3. Add water, salt pork, salt, and onion to the crockpot. Stir well so that the beans are fully covered by the liquid.
4. Place a liner in the base of the crockpot.
5. Cover with lid and cook on low for 14-16 hours, or until the beans are tender. If desired, soak the beans overnight first and then cook for 10-12 hours on low.
6. Once the beans are tender, drain the liquid but reserve about 4 cups of it.
7. In a separate bowl, combine the reserved bean liquid, molasses, catsup, brown sugar, and dry mustard.
8. Add this mixture to the beans in the liner.
9. Stir well to combine.
10. Cover the crockpot and cook on low for an additional 6-8 hours.
